evals.prompt: Ask gemini to analyze this codebase and tell me about the overall architecture and design patterns
evals.expected_output: The skill should acknowledge the request, mention delegating to Gemini's 1M token context window, and attempt to use the MCP server to analyze the codebase

evals.prompt: Can you ask Gemini to do a security review of my project? I want to know about any vulnerabilities
evals.expected_output: The skill should trigger on 'ask Gemini', acknowledge the security review request, and delegate to Gemini for security-focused analysis

evals.prompt: I'm wondering about code quality in this repo. ASK GEMINI what it thinks about maintainability and technical debt
evals.expected_output: The skill should trigger even with uppercase 'ASK GEMINI', acknowledge the code quality question, and delegate to Gemini for analysis

evals.prompt: Please ask gemini to look at this codebase and identify any performance bottlenecks or optimization opportunities
evals.expected_output: The skill should trigger on 'ask gemini', acknowledge the performance analysis request, and attempt to use Gemini for the analysis

evals.prompt: Hey can you analyze this code for me? I want to understand the structure better
evals.expected_output: Without the 'ask gemini' trigger phrase, this should NOT activate the gemini-analyzer skill (baseline test)
